summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MoneyBook image upload fix. Successfully verified that uploaded images now use /api/uploads/ path instead of /uploads/, images are accessible via external URL, and chat interface displays images correctly. All backend APIs working, frontend functionality verified, and image routing fix is functioning as intended.

ui_bugs.issue: Image alt attribute shows 'attachment' instead of descriptive text
ui_bugs.note: Images display correctly but alt text could be improved for accessibility

passed_tests: Login API with phone number authentication (/api/login)
Image upload API (/api/image) returns correct /api/uploads/ media_url
Uploaded images accessible via external URL with /api/uploads/ path
Navigation between tabs (Chat, Analytics, Dues & Staff, Profile)
Image display in chat interface using correct /api/uploads/ path
Image clickability for opening in new tab
normalizeImageUrl() helper functions in MessageBubble.jsx and OperatorDashboard.jsx

success_percentage.backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed including new image upload tests)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor alt text issue)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (image upload and display integration working correctly)
